LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN'S DEMURRER, SUBMITTED ON JUL-23-2012 BY CURTIS KARNOW. THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. THE PLAINTIFF FILED AN OPPOSITION AND SUBMITTED A COPY TO THE COURT. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND DEFENDANT COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN'S DEMURRER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

Defendant Commissioner Sue Kaplan'S Demurrer
Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kevin McLaughlin, Esq. of Meyers Nave Riback Silver & Wilson, Tel. 510.808.2000, appearing for Defendant and moving party;
Mark Cato, Tel. 415.410.6023, plaintiff and opposing party appearing on his own behalf.

The matter was discussed. The plaintiff filed an opposition and submitted a copy to the court. The court vacated its tentative ruling and Defendant Commissioner Sue Kaplan'S Demurrer is taken under submission. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
